name: m2_6_unshielded_gyro_rate_targeted_scan
scope: M2.6 targeted scan only; not full M2b MAP-Elites and not M3.

mechanism.fairness_requirement: The same boot_px4_params and px4_params are applied to classical and RAPTOR runs; ULOG fairness must verify the shared vehicle_angular_velocity topic is present and routed into raptor_input.angular_velocity.

physical_credibility.gyro_filter: Cutoffs below the X500 v2 nominal 30 Hz emulate abnormal but realistic gyro filtering phase lag on the shared controller-rate topic; they are parameter faults, not RAPTOR-only observation edits.
physical_credibility.twr: TWR is changed through SIH_T_MAX/SIH_Q_MAX with MPC_THR_HOVER compensation so both controllers fly the same high-authority plant.
